title: Derived icon geometry (dist)
description: Schema for components/dist/icons/icons.json: the derived, vendored icon read-surface produced by scripts/icons/derive-icons-svg.js. Each icon carries geometry (viewBox, body) plus joined provenance (group, dsKey, nodeId). icons.minProperties:1 guards against an empty library shipping after a Figma category mass-loss.

_schema_version.description: Substrate schema version. Pinned at 1; bump only on a schema-incompatible change to the file shape.

_meta.description: Provenance stamp on the CI-derived file. Documents the source script and generation metadata.

examples.do_not_edit: Edit components/src/icons-svg.json; CI regenerates this file.

auto_generated.description: True when this file was produced by the derive script.

source.description: Relative path (from repo root) of the script that generated this file.

do_not_edit.description: Guidance string signalling that manual edits will be overwritten on next derive run.
examples: Edit components/src/icons-svg.json; CI regenerates this file.

icons.description: Map of icon slug -> geometry and provenance. Each icon includes SVG geometry (viewBox, body) plus metadata joined at derive time (group, dsKey, nodeId from Figma). minProperties:1 ensures library is never empty.

viewBox.description: SVG viewBox: four space-separated numbers (minX minY width height).

body.description: Inner SVG markup (paths/groups), no root <svg>. Normalized to currentColor for rendering flexibility.

group.description: Icon category group (e.g. 'Navigation', 'Status'). Null if uncategorized.

dsKey.description: Figma-derived stable key for this icon node. Null if not applicable.

nodeId.description: Figma node ID. Null if not applicable.
